items.name: Merely's Hover Surfboard
items.description: It's spring break, and the surf is up!  "But wait," you say, "I'm not near the ocean." With Merely's Hover Surfboard, no ocean, no problem!  Hover along on your delightful hover surfboard - wherever you are in the world! We know you have many choices when you hover, but when you want the best, make it a Merely! Don't seranok it until you've tried it!
